hero.title: Turn WhatsApp into
hero.subtitle: Ventry is the WhatsApp-first operations layer for service businesses. Connect your Meta account, configure services and hours, and run bookings from one backoffice.
hero.trustedBy: Built for teams that already run sales and support through WhatsApp

painPoints.title: Sound Familiar?
painPoints.subtitle: Running bookings through WhatsApp chats is chaos. You deserve better.

items.title: Lost in the Chat
items.description: Bookings buried in endless message threads. Missed appointments, double bookings, and frustrated customers.

items.title: Apps Are Expensive
items.description: Building a custom booking app costs thousands and takes months. Most small businesses cannot justify the investment.

items.title: Customers Won't Download
items.description: Your clients do not want another app on their phone. They are already on WhatsApp, so meet them there.

items.title: No Visibility
items.description: No dashboard, no status control, and no structured way to manage cancellations or keep the operation aligned.

solution.title: WhatsApp for customers. Backoffice for operators.
solution.subtitle: Keep customers inside chat and give your team structured operations.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp for Customers
whatsapp.description: Customers stay in WhatsApp for booking flows, confirmations, cancellations, and reminders. No extra app, no extra account.

backoffice.title: Backoffice for Your Team
backoffice.description: Owners and staff manage services, business hours, bookings, and templates from one tenant workspace.

howItWorks.title: Go live in 4 real steps
howItWorks.subtitle: The flow matches the product onboarding, not a marketing demo.

steps.title: Connect WhatsApp
steps.description: Finish the Meta setup and link your WhatsApp Business account to your tenant.

steps.title: Configure Services
steps.description: Create the services you actually sell, with duration, price, and active status.

steps.title: Set Business Hours
steps.description: Define opening hours so the operation has real availability before going live.

steps.title: Review and Go Live
steps.description: Complete onboarding and move the tenant into the ready state to enter the dashboard.

features.title: Bookings first, built on a real SaaS core
features.subtitle: Aligned with the backend architecture: tenant provisioning, bookings MVP, notifications, and WhatsApp first.

items.title: WhatsApp-First Booking Flows
items.description: Customers book directly through WhatsApp with guided flows. No external links or extra apps.

items.title: Tenant Provisioning
items.description: Each business starts in provisioning and completes onboarding before reaching the operational dashboard.

items.title: Service Configuration
items.description: Define durations, prices, currencies, and active services from the backoffice.

items.title: Operational Dashboard
items.description: Track bookings, clients, setup progress, and current status from one workspace.

items.title: Business Hours
items.description: Store the real weekly schedule the booking flow depends on before the tenant goes live.

items.title: Notification Templates
items.description: Manage confirmation, reminder, and cancellation templates from the backoffice.

items.title: Role-Based Access
items.description: Owners, admins, staff, and platform operators work with the right permissions and scope.

items.title: Multi-Tenant Isolation
items.description: Built as a true SaaS platform. Each business gets its own isolated workspace and configuration.

verticals.title: Built for service businesses
verticals.subtitle: The same operational core adapts to the verticals that already live inside WhatsApp.

items.title: Barbershops
items.description: Haircuts, beard trims, and combos with booking flows that match short, frequent appointments.

items.title: Clinics and Aesthetics
items.description: Consultations, treatments, and follow-ups with more structured confirmations and time slots.

items.title: Beauty Salons
items.description: Nails, hair, and makeup with configurable services and a cleaner backoffice operation.

items.title: Veterinary Clinics
items.description: Pet appointments, vaccinations, and check-ups using the same booking core and confirmation flow.

pricing.title: Choose your rollout path
pricing.subtitle: Whether you are piloting one location or standardizing multiple teams, the operational core stays the same.

plans.name: Pilot
plans.description: For one business validating WhatsApp bookings

plans.name: Operations
plans.description: For teams that need bookings live fast

plans.name: Multi-Site
plans.description: For operators planning multiple tenants or future modules

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: The product story now matches the backend scope.

items.question: Do my customers need to install an app?
items.answer: No. Customers book directly through WhatsApp, which they already use. No downloads, no extra sign-up, no friction.

items.question: Can I use my current WhatsApp Business number?
items.answer: Yes. You connect your existing WhatsApp Business setup during onboarding.

items.question: Do I pay Meta or Ventry for WhatsApp usage?
items.answer: Meta bills the WhatsApp Business Platform directly. Ventry sits on top as the configuration, automation, and backoffice layer.

items.question: Is Ventry a messaging provider?
items.answer: No. Ventry is the operational layer on top of Meta channels. It handles provisioning, automation, bookings, and the backoffice.

items.question: Is Ventry only for bookings?
items.answer: For now, yes. Bookings and notifications are the MVP scope while the core architecture stays ready for more modules later.

items.question: Will Ventry support more channels later?
items.answer: Yes. WhatsApp is the first channel. Instagram Messaging and Facebook Messenger are planned on the same core engine.

finalCta.title: Launch the bookings MVP on top of WhatsApp
finalCta.subtitle: Start with onboarding, connect your Meta setup, and bring your team into a real backoffice.

footer.description: WhatsApp-first operations layer for service businesses.
